description: Instruction text begins to appear on the screen, prompting the user to start the session.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text appearing at the bottom.

description: Instruction text updates to provide a specific scenario: planning a holiday from the Sunshine Coast to London.
frame_description: The text on screen changes to describe the travel planning task.

description: Instruction text continues to reveal details about the task, including exploring flights, dates, and comparing routes.
frame_description: The instruction text progressively reveals more details about the research task.

description: An 'Open' button appears in the top right corner, signaling the next step in the process.
frame_description: A circular 'Open' button appears at the top right of the screen.

description: Task instructions text updates dynamically on the screen, guiding the user through the session requirements.
frame_description: A dark overlay displaying sequential text instructions and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
User navigates from the task instructions overlay to the Google homepage.
User types 'sky' into the Google search bar, triggering search suggestions.
User navigates to the Google search results page for 'skyscanner'.
User hovers over the 'Repeat task instructions' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the button to repeat instructions.

description: User dwells on the instruction text while reading the task details.
frame_description: The cursor rests over the body text of the task instructions.

description: User hovers over the 'Open' button, preparing to proceed with the task.
frame_description: The cursor is centered on the 'Open' button which likely launches the test site.

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 9.5, uniformity: 0.76)
The screen transitions from detailed task instructions to a confirmation prompt 'Yes, please' with an 'Open' button.
The instruction text updates to include the prompt 'please think aloud as you go.'
Scroll E (magnitude: 21.1, uniformity: 0.62)
User pauses on the screen, moving the cursor around the 'Repeat the task instructions' button area while reading.
The instruction text updates to ask 'What are you looking at right now?'
User types "sunsh" into the "From" input field
User selects "Sunshine Coast (MCY)" from the autocomplete suggestions
User types "lond" into the "To" input field
User initiates search and navigates to the results page
Search results page loads and updates as flight data is retrieved from providers
The flight search results finished loading, updating from 'Checked 25 of 26 providers' to '997 results sorted by Best'.
frame_description: The loading indicator for flight providers disappears and is replaced by the total number of results found.

description: User pauses to examine the flight search results, specifically the details for an Emirates and Qantas flight from London Gatwick to Maroochydore.
frame_description: The screen shows flight search results on Skyscanner, specifically an Emirates + Qantas flight and a Qatar Airways flight.

description: The UI transitions from displaying flight search results to a 'no flights' message accompanied by 'London hotel deals', likely due to a filter update or a temporary loading state.
frame_description: The screen changes from showing Virgin Australia and Qantas flight options to a message stating no flights match the filters, showing hotel deals instead.

description: The UI state reverts from the 'no flights' message back to displaying the flight search results.
frame_description: The flight search results (Virgin Australia, Qantas) reappear on the screen.

description: User hovers over the 'Book Direct with Virgin Australia' information box, causing the cursor to change to a pointer
frame_description: The flight search results page showing a Virgin Australia booking option.

description: The page scrolls upwards, bringing the flight category summary tabs (Best, Cheapest, Fastest) into view
frame_description: The view shifts from the flight details to the summary tabs at the top of the results list.

description: User hovers over the 'Best' flight category tab, which displays a price of $2,693
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Best' tab at the top of the search results.

description: User types 'london' into the destination search field
frame_description: The user is entering the destination 'london' into the search input field.

description: User selects 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom' from the search suggestions
frame_description: The input field is updated with the full location name from the autocomplete dropdown.

description: User pauses to read the task instructions presented on the dark overlay screen.
frame_description: A dark overlay screen is visible, which according to the context contains task instructions.
